# Generated Files Directory

This directory contains files generated by the CADomatic system when running within the GenCAD workbench in FreeCAD.

## Contents

- `result_script.py` - The generated FreeCAD Python script based on your text description
- `screenshot.png` - Screenshot of the generated CAD model
- `last_run_log.txt` - Log file containing execution details and errors for debugging

## Notes

- This directory is automatically created when running the GenCAD workbench
- Files in this directory are overwritten with each new generation request
- The directory is located at `~/.FreeCAD/Mod/GenCAD/generated` when running within FreeCAD
